candidates.why: Best direct top-line revenue label; populated and non-total component-style revenue line.
Also matches total revenue/sales, but is a total/duplicate of the main revenue line so lower priority.

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue label changes over time; first non-missing should be used.

candidates.why: Best direct cost-of-sales / cost-of-revenue line tied to revenue generation.
Direct production input costs, but narrower than total cost of revenue and may omit other direct costs.

variables.notes: Preferred over material-only rows because it is the full direct cost bucket.

candidates.why: Candidate SG&A component, but not the clearest explicit SG&A row.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Clear SG&A component within SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Useful diagnostic row, but it excludes R&D and is not the broadest explicit SG&A row.
Too broad and includes COGS, so not appropriate when explicit SG&A exists.
R&D line exists but should not replace the broader SG&A row.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses the best explicit SG&A row present in the preview: 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total'. Per hierarchy, because an explicit populated SG&A row exists, select only that row. This row appears to include R&D, as indicated by 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses' plus supplemental R&D approximately reconciling to total SG&A. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D line above EBIT; strongest conceptual match even though preview cells are blank.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental R&D amount with values; useful fallback if dedicated line is missing in some years.
Also a clear R&D fallback label.

final_choice.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental

variables.notes: R&D appears to be included in SG&A, supported by the presence of 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses'; therefore mapping XRD separately is appropriate so XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes it.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best recurring interest expense measure; preferred over gross interest and over total/net finance cost.
Also matches interest expense, but appears duplicative of net-of-capitalized-interest line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring finance cost, but likely already included in total interest expense; adding risks double count.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Avoided 'Financing Income/(Expense) - Net - Total' and other net finance rows because granular recurring interest expense is available. Did not add lease-interest supplemental row to avoid possible double counting.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best book equity measure because it excludes minority interest and is attributable to parent owners.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent owner-attributable equity line; useful fallback.
Also owner equity and appears equal, but slightly less explicit than attributable-to-parent wording.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list uses owner-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest line.
Also direct minority interest label; good fallback if labeling changes.

variables.notes: Priority list for minority interest / non-controlling interest label changes over time.
